mapper.sql: id, log_type, title, description, method, request_url, request_method, request_param, response_result, operate_ip, operate_location, user_id, user_name, execute_time, error_msg, status, trace_id, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_log_info ( id, log_type, title, description, method, request_url, request_method, request_param, response_result, operate_ip, operate_location, user_id, user_name, execute_time, error_msg, status, trace_id, create_by, create_org, create_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{logType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{method}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParam}, #{responseResult}, #{operateIp}, #{operateLocation}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{executeTime}, #{errorMsg}, #{status}, #{traceId}, #{createBy}, #{createOrg}, #{createTime} )
